expected_sample_count_provenance: Rejected or out-of-scope projects stay in the intake inventory but do not yet carry a curated sample-count claim.
rejection_reason: Modern caribou comparator retained only as an explicit reject so cross-cervid context does not masquerade as domesticated support.
extraction_plan: Retain the project in the tracked inventory with an explicit rejection reason so future readers can see why it does not feed the animal sample database.
